Verify Saved Responses button",Saved Responses button present next to GIF,- SHOULD display a Saved Responses button positioned next to the GIF button in the Editor nav,High 2,,,"1. Hover over the Saved Responses button 2. Verify tooltip",Saved Responses button tooltip on hover,"- SHOULD show tooltip with text ""Saved Responses""",Medium 3,,AC2: Saved Response popup,"1. Login as Coach 2. Navigate to a conversation 3. Click the Saved Responses button 4. Verify modal",Saved Responses modal opens on button click,- SHOULD display the Saved Responses modal,High 4,,,"1. Verify modal",Saved Responses modal opens via keyboard shortcut,- SHOULD display the Saved Responses modal,High 5,,,,"Modal contains X button, Search box, Create new button","- SHOULD display X button - SHOULD display Search box - SHOULD display + Create New button in top-right corner",High 6,,,"1. Hover over + Create New button 2. Verify button label",Create New button hover label,"- SHOULD display as ""+ Create New"" on hover",Low 7,,,"1. Open modal with no saved responses 2. Verify empty state",Empty state display when no saved responses,"- SHOULD display an image - SHOULD display text: ""Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats.""",High 8,,,"1. Open modal with saved responses present 2. Verify list layout",Left panel shows list of saved response titles,- SHOULD display list of saved response titles on left side of modal,High 9,,,,List ordered by latest updated time,- SHOULD order saved responses by latest updated time,High 10,,,,FREQUENTLY USED section shows top 5 most-used responses,"- SHOULD display FREQUENTLY USED section with top 5 responses sorted by usage_count descending - SHOULD sort by title A-Z when usage_count is equal",High 11,,,,FREQUENTLY USED section shows fewer than 5 when available,- SHOULD display all available responses in FREQUENTLY USED section when fewer than 5 exist,Medium 12,,,,FREQUENTLY USED section hidden when no frequently used responses,- SHOULD hide the FREQUENTLY USED section when no responses have been used,Medium 13,,,,ALL section lists all saved responses A-Z,- SHOULD display ALL section with all saved responses sorted by title A-Z,High 14,,,,First saved response selected by default,- SHOULD select the first saved response in the list by default,High 15,,,"1. Press Up/Down arrow keys in modal 2. Verify selection movement",Arrow keys navigate between saved responses,- SHOULD move selection up and down through the list using Up/Down arrow keys,Medium 16,,,"1. Select a saved response in the list 2. Verify right panel",Right panel shows title and message detail of selected response,- SHOULD display the title and message detail of the currently selected saved response on the right side,High 17,,,"1. Hover over message detail on right panel 2. Verify 3-dot button",3-dot button appears on message detail hover,- SHOULD show 3-dot button on hover over the message detail,Medium 18,,,,Message detail scrollable when long,- SHOULD allow scrolling when message content is long,Medium 19,,,"1. Hover over a saved response title in the list 2. Verify right panel updates",Hovering title previews message detail on right panel,- SHOULD update right panel to show message detail of the hovered saved response,Medium 20,,,"1. Scroll down in modal with more than 20 responses 2. Verify pagination",Pagination loads 20 items initially and on scroll,"- SHOULD load 20 items per page - SHOULD display Load more and fetch next 20 items when user scrolls down",Medium 21,,,"1. Observe modal footer 2. Verify shortcut hints",Footer shows keyboard shortcut hints,"- SHOULD display footer with: ""↑↓ to navigate"", ""↵ to select"", ""Esc to close""",Low 22,,,"1. Click X button or press Esc 2. Verify modal",X button / Esc closes modal,- SHOULD close the Saved Responses modal,High 23,,AC3: Search box behaviors,"1. Open Saved Responses modal 2. Observe search box",Search box default state,"- SHOULD display search box empty with placeholder ""Search saved response""",High 24,,,"1. Click/focus on search box 2. Verify placeholder",Search box placeholder changes on focus,"- SHOULD change placeholder to ""Enter keyword..."" when focused",Low 25,,,"1. Type text in search box 2. Verify X icon",X icon appears when text is entered,- SHOULD display X icon when search input contains text,Medium 26,,,"1. Type text in search box 2. Clear via backspace or click X icon 3. Verify list",Clearing search input restores full list,- SHOULD remove search input and display the full saved responses list when cleared,High 27,,,"1. Type 1 character in search box 2. Verify search triggers",Search triggers from 1 character,- SHOULD start searching from the first character entered,Medium 28,,,"1. Enter a keyword matching title or message 2. Verify results",Search matches title and message fields case-insensitively,"- SHOULD return all saved responses where title or message contains the keyword (case-insensitive, partial match)",High 29,,,"1. Enter a keyword with no matches 2. Verify empty result state",No results state on search,"- SHOULD display an image - SHOULD display text: ""Search results (0)""",High 30,,,"1. Enter a keyword with matching results 2. Verify result count label",Search result count displayed below search box,"- SHOULD display ""Search results ({number_of_matched_results})"" below the search box",Medium 31,,,,Search results show list with first item selected,"- SHOULD display matched results in the same list format as AC2 - SHOULD select the first result by default",Medium 32,,,"1. Search with more than 20 matching results 2. Scroll down 3. Verify pagination",Search results pagination loads 20 at a time,"- SHOULD load 20 items initially - SHOULD display Load more and fetch next 20 items when user scrolls down",Medium 33,,AC4: 3-dot button behaviors,"1. Open Saved Responses modal 2. Hover over a saved response message detail 3. Click the 3-dot button 4. Verify submenu",3-dot submenu shows Edit and Delete options,"- SHOULD display submenu with options: Edit response, Delete response",High 34,,AC5: Add a new saved response,"1. Open Saved Responses modal 2. Click + Create New button 3. Verify Create Saved Response popup",Create Saved Response popup opens,"- SHOULD display popup with title ""Create Saved Response"" - SHOULD display [X] button, TITLE field, MESSAGE field, Cancel button, Save button",High 35,,,"1. Click [X] button in Create Saved Response popup 2. Verify popup",X button closes Create Saved Response popup,- SHOULD close the Create Saved Response popup,High 36,,,"1. Observe TITLE field 2. Verify info icon tooltip",TITLE field info icon tooltip,"- SHOULD display (info) icon next to TITLE field label - SHOULD show tooltip: ""Used to organize responses. This won't appear in messages.."" on hover",Low 37,,,"1. Observe TITLE field default state 2. Verify placeholder",TITLE field empty by default with placeholder,"- SHOULD be empty with placeholder: ""Name this response for easy search""",Medium 38,,,"1. Type 140 characters in TITLE field 2. Attempt to type more 3. Verify input",TITLE field max 140 character limit,- SHOULD not allow input beyond 140 characters,High 39,,,"1. Paste text longer than 140 characters in TITLE field 2. Verify result",TITLE field paste truncated to 140 characters,- SHOULD paste only the first 140 characters when pasted text exceeds the limit,High 40,,,"1. Observe MESSAGE field default state 2. Verify placeholder",MESSAGE field empty by default with placeholder,"- SHOULD be empty with placeholder: ""Write the full message you want to send to clients""",Medium 41,,,"1. Type in MESSAGE field 2. Verify character count display",MESSAGE field character count shown,"- SHOULD display character count as ""{X}/10000""",Medium 42,,,"1. Type 10000 characters in MESSAGE field 2. Attempt to type more 3. Verify input","MESSAGE field max 10,000 character limit","- SHOULD not allow input beyond 10,000 characters",High 43,,,"1. Paste text longer than 10,000 characters in MESSAGE field 2. Verify result","MESSAGE field paste truncated to 10,000 characters","- SHOULD paste only the first 10,000 characters when pasted text exceeds the limit",High 44,,,"1. Paste formatted text (bold, italic, etc.) into MESSAGE field 2. Verify formatting",MESSAGE field strips text formatting on paste,- SHOULD clear any text formatting from pasted content,High 45,,,"1. Observe Cancel button state 2. Verify",Cancel button always enabled,- SHOULD always be enabled regardless of field state,Low 46,,,"1. Click Cancel button 2. Verify popup",Cancel button closes Create Saved Response popup,- SHOULD close the Create Saved Response popup,High 47,,,"1. Leave TITLE or MESSAGE field empty 2. Observe Save button",Save button disabled when fields are empty,- SHOULD be disabled when either TITLE or MESSAGE field has no input,High 48,,,"1. Fill in both TITLE and MESSAGE fields 2. Observe Save button",Save button enabled with both fields filled,- SHOULD be enabled when both TITLE and MESSAGE fields have input,High 49,,,"1. Fill in both fields 2. Click Save button 3. Verify result",Save button creates new saved response and shows toast,"- SHOULD add the new saved response to the list - SHOULD display toast: ""New Saved Response created.""",High 50,,AC6: Edit a saved response,"1. Open Saved Responses modal 2. Hover over a saved response message detail 3. Click 3-dot button 4. Click Edit response 5. Verify Edit Saved Response popup",Edit Saved Response popup opens,"- SHOULD display popup with title ""Edit Saved Response"" - SHOULD pre-populate TITLE and MESSAGE fields with existing values",High 51,,,"1. Open Edit popup without making changes 2. Click [X] button 3. Verify",X button closes Edit popup when no changes made,- SHOULD close the Edit Saved Response popup,High 52,,,"1. Make a change in Edit popup 2. Click [X] button 3. Verify Discard Changes popup",X button triggers Discard Changes popup when changes exist,"- SHOULD display Discard Changes popup with title ""Discard Changes?"" - SHOULD display text: ""Are you sure you want to go? Changes have not been saved yet."" - SHOULD display Cancel button and [X] icon and Discard Changes button",High 53,,,"1. When Discard Changes popup is shown 2. Click Cancel or [X] in Discard Changes popup 3. Verify",Cancel / X in Discard Changes popup closes the discard popup only,- SHOULD close the Discard Changes popup and return to the Edit Saved Response popup,High 54,,,"1. Click Discard Changes button 2. Verify",Discard Changes button closes edit popup without saving,- SHOULD close Discard Changes popup and Edit Saved Response popup without saving changes,High 55,,,"1. Open Edit popup without making changes 2. Click Cancel button 3. Verify",Cancel button closes Edit popup when no changes made,- SHOULD close the Edit Saved Response popup,High 56,,,"1. Make a change in Edit popup 2. Click Cancel button 3. Verify Discard Changes popup",Cancel button triggers Discard Changes popup when changes exist,- SHOULD display Discard Changes popup (same as [X] button behavior),High 57,,,"1. Fill in both TITLE and MESSAGE fields in Edit popup 2. Click Save button 3. Verify result",Save button updates response and shows toast,"- SHOULD save the changes for that response - SHOULD display toast: ""Saved Response updated successfully.""",High 58,,AC7: Delete a saved response,"1. Open Saved Responses modal 2. Hover over a saved response message detail 3. Click 3-dot button 4. Click Delete response 5. Verify confirmation popup",Delete confirmation popup shown,"- SHOULD display popup with title ""Delete Response?"" - SHOULD display text: ""This response will be permanently deleted and can't be recovered.
Are you sure you want to proceed?"" - SHOULD display Cancel button and OK button",High 59,,,"1. Click Cancel in delete confirmation popup 2. Verify",Cancel closes delete confirmation popup,- SHOULD close the delete confirmation popup without deleting,High 60,,,"1. Click OK in delete confirmation popup 2. Verify result",OK deletes response and shows toast,"- SHOULD close the popup, delete the response, and display toast: ""Saved Response deleted.""",High 61,,AC8: Add saved response to chatbox,"1. Open Saved Responses modal 2. Click title of a saved response or press Enter 3. Verify chatbox",Selecting saved response appends message to chatbox,- SHOULD append the full message content of the selected response into the chatbox behind existing text,High 62,US2: Create a saved response from a message in conversation,AC1: Add Save this response button to Coach's non-text message,"1. Login as Coach 2. Navigate to a conversation 3. Hover over a non-text message sent by Coach 4. Verify bookmark button",Bookmark button appears on hover for Coach non-text messages,- SHOULD display a bookmark button between the 3-dot and Reply buttons for Coach's non-text messages,High 63,,,"1. Hover over the bookmark button 2. Verify tooltip",Bookmark button tooltip on hover,"- SHOULD show tooltip: ""Saved this response""",Low 64,,,"1. Login as Coach on a workspace NOT on Pro/Studio plan 2. Hover over a non-text Coach message 3. Verify bookmark button",Bookmark button hidden on non-paid plan workspaces,- SHOULD NOT display the bookmark button for workspaces not on Pro or Studio plan,High 65,,AC2: Add new saved response from conversation,"1. Click the bookmark button on a Coach non-text message 2. Verify popup",Add To Saved Responses popup opens with pre-populated message,"- SHOULD display popup with title ""Add To Saved Responses"" - SHOULD leave TITLE field blank - SHOULD pre-populate MESSAGE field with the Coach's message content",High 66,,,"1. Click bookmark button on a Coach message with over 10,000 characters 2. Verify MESSAGE field content","MESSAGE pre-populated truncated to 10,000 characters","- SHOULD pre-populate MESSAGE field with only the first 10,000 characters of the message",High 67,,,"1. Fill in TITLE field 2. Click Save button 3. Verify result",Save button adds new response and shows toast from conversation,"- SHOULD add the message as a new saved response - SHOULD display toast: ""Response has been saved""",High
